nexocore.math.name: nexocore.math
nexocore.math.author: Nexo Core Security
nexocore.math.code:
<3 Nexo Core - Mathematical Operations Library
<3 Copyright 2026 Florentina Spicco D'aura

<3 Calculates the exponential power of a base
do pow(base, exponent) {
    result = 1
    while exponent > 0 {
        result = result * base
        exponent = exponent - 1
    }
    return result
}

<3 Returns the absolute absolute value
do abs(val) {
    if val < 0 {
        return val * (0 - 1)
    }
    return val
}

<3 Evaluates the higher constraint
do max(a, b) {
    if a > b {
        return a
    }
    return b
}

<3 Evaluates the lower boundary
do min(a, b) {
    if a < b {
        return a
    }
    return b
}

nexocore.io.name: nexocore.io
nexocore.io.author: Nexo Core Security
nexocore.io.code:
<3 Nexo Core - Input/Output Protocol Array
<3 Copyright 2026 Florentina Spicco D'aura

<3 Throws a distinctly formatted Error payload
do error(message) {
    write "[V-ERROR] " + message
}

<3 Resolves a deeply formatted Success prompt
do success(message) {
    write "[V-SUCCESS] " + message
}

<3 Highlights an edge constraint payload
do warn(message) {
    write "[V-WARNING] " + message
}

<3 Generates a strict application bounding box banner
do banner(appName, version) {
    write "========================================="
    write "  " + appName + " (v" + version + ")"
    write "========================================="
}

nexocore.net.name: nexocore.net
nexocore.net.author: Nexo Core Security
nexocore.net.code:
<3 Nexo Core - HTTP Networking Protocols
<3 Copyright 2026 Florentina Spicco D'aura

<3 Dispatches a highly synchronous HTTP GET stream
do get(url) {
    return httpGet(url)
}

<3 Posts a JSON payload body forcefully to a target REST endpoint
do postJson(url, jsonString) {
    return httpPost(url, jsonString)
}

nexocore.discord.name: nexocore.discord
nexocore.discord.author: Nexo Core Security
nexocore.discord.code:
<3 Nexo Core - Discord Webhook Integration
<3 Copyright 2026 Florentina Spicco D'aura

using nexocore.net

<3 Broadcasts an anonymous Webhook packet straight to a Discord channel
do sendWebhook(webhookUrl, botName, textMessage) {
    <3 Structuring raw JSON natively using N# string allocations
    rawJson = "{\"username\": \"" + botName + "\", \"content\": \"" + textMessage + "\"}"
    
    <3 Pipe the transmission through the .NET Native bounds
    response = postJson(webhookUrl, rawJson)
    return response
}

nexocore.system.name: nexocore.system
nexocore.system.author: Nexo Core Security
nexocore.system.code:
<3 Nexo Core - OS Terminal Bindings
<3 Copyright 2026 Florentina Spicco D'aura

<3 Directly executes raw Terminal/PowerShell/Bash commands via the Host System
do run(terminalCommand) {
    return executeCommand(terminalCommand)
}

nexocore.fs.name: nexocore.fs
nexocore.fs.author: Nexo Core Security
nexocore.fs.code:
<3 Nexo Core - File System Manipulation
<3 Copyright 2026 Florentina Spicco D'aura

<3 Reads absolute textual buffer from a file
do read(path) {
    return fileRead(path)
}

<3 Writes literal content string to a target bounding file
do write(path, content) {
    fileWrite(path, content)
}

<3 Evaluates the structural existence of an OS file path
do exists(path) {
    return fileExists(path)
}

nexocore.string.name: nexocore.string
nexocore.string.author: Nexo Core Security
nexocore.string.code:
<3 Nexo Core - String Manipulation
<3 Copyright 2026 Florentina Spicco D'aura

<3 Calculates literal length of a scalar string payload
do length(str) {
    return stringLength(str)
}

<3 Injects new payload across all matched instances
do replace(str, oldVal, newVal) {
    return stringReplace(str, oldVal, newVal)
}

<3 Ascertains if payload structure exists
do contains(str, val) {
    return stringContains(str, val)
}

do upper(str) {
    return stringUpper(str)
}

do lower(str) {
    return stringLower(str)
}

nexocore.time.name: nexocore.time
nexocore.time.author: Nexo Core Security
nexocore.time.code:
<3 Nexo Core - Chronological Ecosystem
<3 Copyright 2026 Florentina Spicco D'aura

<3 Halts native OS execution thread forcibly for milliseconds
do sleep(ms) {
    sleep(ms)
}

<3 Generates native Server Unix Milliseconds from Host Hardware
do now() {
    return systemTime()
}

nexocore.crypto.name: nexocore.crypto
nexocore.crypto.author: Nexo Core Security
nexocore.crypto.code:
<3 Nexo Core - Cryptographic Operations
<3 Copyright 2026 Florentina Spicco D'aura

<3 Encodes raw UTF-8 String explicitly into Base64 format
do base64Encode(plainText) {
    return base64Encode(plainText)
}

<3 Decodes bound Base64 string payload back into literal UTF-8 string
do base64Decode(base64String) {
    return base64Decode(base64String)
}

nexocore.map.name: nexocore.map
nexocore.map.author: Nexo Core Security
nexocore.map.code:
<3 Nexo Core - Dynamic Memory Mapping (Dictionaries)
<3 Copyright 2026 Florentina Spicco D'aura

<3 Instantiates a volatile Map (Dictionary Object) natively mapping to .NET IL Space
do create() {
    return mapCreate()
}

<3 Forcefully assigns a Value to a Key internally in the Map structure
do set(mapTarget, keyName, valueScalar) {
    mapSet(mapTarget, keyName, valueScalar)
}

<3 Safely extracts payload via a specific structural Key
do get(mapTarget, keyName) {
    return mapGet(mapTarget, keyName)
}
